extortion.description: Our Company—Over 30 years of Success and LeadershipNorthland Auto Solutions is proud to be your preferred dealership solutions and insurance services provider. Founded in 1990 by Executive Director Allen Lentsch, we provide dealers with programs to support used car leasing, daily rentals, and all your dealership’s insurance needs. Northland is also known for ancillary products such as bonds, dealer supplies and GPS devices.The real surprise you’ll find in doing business with us is that we are approachable, knowledgeable, and share our experiences in ways that you can understand, learn from, and follow.- Database- Financial documents- Personal information of employees and clients https://northlandautosolutions.com/
